description: The phrase '2.35× faster' is not rigorously supported in the absence of a mathematical derivation connecting R(d) asymptotics to density convergence; discussion of this numerical comparison should be removed.
action_taken: The phrase '2.35× faster' is not rigorously supported in the absence of a mathematical derivation connecting R(d) asymptotics to density convergence; discussion of this numerical comparison should be removed.
